snippets: xamples/example_dataset_readme.txt --- This example dataset was recorded using ROS bag. Sensors were synchronized using PTP and a hardware trigger for cameras. Each message includes a header.stamp generated from the acquisition clock. The bag
bag record time is the middleware receive time and should not be used as the sensor acquisition time. Playback can use rosbag play --clock.
